item.title: Breaking: Trump announces new 25% tariff on Chinese imports
item.description: President Trump announced a new 25% tariff on a range of Chinese imports effective immediately.

item.title: Powell: Fed will remain data-dependent on rate decisions
item.description: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell said the central bank will remain data-dependent.

item.title: Gold hits record high as Treasury yields decline
item.description: Gold futures settled at a record high as yields fell.
